name: Eskom Holdings SOC Limited
description: South Africa's state-owned electricity utility responsible for approximately 95% of the country's electricity supply, operating generation, transmission and distribution infrastructure.

name: Transnet SOC Limited
description: State-owned freight transport, port operations and pipelines company providing an integrated logistics network across South Africa and into sub-Saharan Africa.

name: South African Airways (SAA)
description: South Africa's national carrier operating domestic, regional and international routes, currently undergoing a strategic equity partnership with Takatso Consortium.

name: Denel SOC Limited
description: State-owned defence, aerospace and technology company supplying products and services to the South African National Defence Force and international clients.

name: South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL)
description: SANRAL is responsible for the planning, design, construction, operation, rehabilitation and maintenance of South Africa's national road network of approximately 22,000 km.

name: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa (PRASA)
description: PRASA provides rail commuter services in South Africa's metropolitan areas and long-distance passenger rail services through Shosholoza Meyl and Autopax bus services.
